title: anthemis marschalliana subsp. biebersteiniana
intro: Anthemis marschalliana subsp. biebersteiniana, also known as Marshals chamomile, is a plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and soothing properties. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anthemis marschalliana subsp. biebersteiniana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
